description_long: This is a futuristic, compact airplane with a sleek, angular design and a predominantly metallic gray exterior accented by green highlights. The aircraft features two large, circular turbofan engines mounted on either side of the fuselage, each with visible fan blades and intricate mechanical detailing. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the body, with additional vertical stabilizers and winglets for enhanced aerodynamic stability. The cockpit is centrally located and enclosed with a transparent canopy, offering a clear view for the pilot. The tail section is characterized by twin vertical stabilizers and additional horizontal surfaces, giving it a distinctive, aggressive profile. The overall appearance suggests advanced technology and high maneuverability, suitable for rapid urban deployment or tactical operations.
description: A sleek, metallic gray airplane with twin turbofan engines, swept-back wings, and green accents, featuring a central enclosed cockpit and a distinctive twin-tail design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, central cockpit canopy, and prominent twin turbofan intakes with green highlights.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the swept-back wings, detailed engine housings, and the layered tail structure with vertical stabilizers.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the twin engine exhausts, vertical stabilizers, and the angular winglets extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the engine details and aerodynamic surfaces.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings, pronounced anhedral angle, and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turbofan engines mounted on pylons at the rear sides of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with additional horizontal stabilizers, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with visible main and nose gear bays.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a transparent canopy integrated into the fuselage.
